gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/386)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/386)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( صلوات الله عليه )

text: مَنْ سَرَّحَ لِحْيَتَهُ سَبْعِينَ مَرَّةً وَ عَدَّهَا مَرَّةً مَرَّةً لَمْ يَقْرَبْهُ الشَّيْطَانُ أَرْبَعِينَ يَوْماً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Atiyya, from Ismail Bin Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who combs his beard seventy times, and enumerates it one by one, the Satan<sup>la</sup> would not come near him for forty days’.
en.sarwar: 10. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Hassan ibn ‘Atiyyah from ’Isma‘il ibn Jabir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one uses his comb seventy times and counts it one by one, Satan will not come close to him for forty days.’”
